consistency_check.damage_scaling_logic: Consistent: Damage scales by 1d8 per spell slot level above 2nd.
consistency_check.component_format: Standard: V, S, M format used correctly.

quality_assessment.mechanics_clarity: High. Damage type (thunder), area of effect (10-foot-radius sphere), save type (Constitution), and special targeting (inorganic material disadvantage) are clearly defined.
quality_assessment.flavor_integration: Good. The description matches the effect (loud ringing noise, thunder damage).
quality_assessment.completeness: Complete. Includes all necessary components: level, school, casting time, range, duration, components, effect, scaling, and associated classes.

mechanics_evaluation.save_mechanic: Constitution saving throw for half damage.
mechanics_evaluation.unique_interactions: Disadvantage on save for inorganic creatures/objects. Deals damage to unsecured nonmagical objects.
mechanics_evaluation.power_level_assessment: Appropriate for a 2nd-level Evocation spell. The AoE and target vulnerability (inorganic) provide utility beyond raw damage against standard targets.

analysis.archivist_notes: Data is well-formed, detailed, and adheres to standard D&D 5e spell formatting conventions. No archival errors detected.
